name: Sunset Ridge Driving Range
about: Sunset Ridge Golf Links in Westbrook, Maine, offers a comprehensive golf and entertainment experience featuring both outdoor golf and disc golf courses alongside indoor golf simulator bays. The venue provides a unique blend of traditional golf activities and modern simulation technology, catering to a wide range of customers from serious golfers to families and event hosts. With a focus on year-round accessibility, the facility includes 5 indoor golf simulators during winter months and a seasonal outdoor swimming pool, making it a versatile community destination.
why_golfers_like_it: Wide selection of over 80 virtual golf courses for simulation play
Both Full Swing and Foresight GCHawk simulator systems for premium experience
Membership options provide discounted simulator rates and all-year access
Additional amenities include outdoor swimming pool and event spaces
Convenient location near Westbrook with ample activities for all seasons

food_and_drink.notes: On-site Bar & Grill available for food service

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium simulator system with driving range mode

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you should bring your own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue has an on-site Bar & Grill.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes in a simulator takes approximately 1 hour, or you can play a quick 9 in about 30 minutes.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Sunset Ridge is family-friendly and offers youth memberships and a seasonal swimming pool.
